name: Spotted Toadstool
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a single classic toadstool with a wide rounded cap covered in evenly spaced round spots, a thick stem with a little ring around it, a ruffled collar at the base of the cap, sitting on a small patch of grass

name: Cute Mushroom Friend
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a chubby cartoon mushroom with a big rounded spotted cap and a happy smiling face on its stem, little rosy cheeks, tiny arms waving hello, standing on a small grassy mound

name: Mushroom House
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a whimsical storybook mushroom house with a tall round spotted cap as the roof, a little arched door and two round windows cut into the thick stem, a small chimney with a curl of smoke, flowers and pebbles around the base

name: Forest Mushroom Cluster
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a cluster of three or four mushrooms of different heights growing close together from a mossy patch, slender curved stems and rounded caps, a few blades of grass and a small leaf at their feet

name: Big Easy Mushroom
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: one large simple mushroom drawn with thick bold shapes, a smooth round cap with just a few big dots, a wide chunky stem, sitting on a single line of ground, plenty of open space to color inside

name: Mushroom Close-Up
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a detailed close-up of a single mushroom seen from below and the side, showing the textured cap on top and the radiating thin gills underneath the cap, the stem in clear view, a few tiny dewdrops

name: Fairy Ring Mushrooms
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a circle of small slender mushrooms forming a fairy ring on a grassy clearing, each mushroom with a delicate cap and thin stem, a couple of tiny flowers and a fluttering butterfly inside the ring

name: Mushrooms on a Log
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: several shelf-like and round mushrooms sprouting from the side and top of a fallen mossy log, different shapes and sizes, patches of moss and a small fern growing nearby

name: Snail and Mushroom
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a friendly smiling snail with a spiral shell resting beside a tall spotted mushroom that towers over it like an umbrella, blades of grass and a tiny pebble, both with cheerful faces

name: Tall Slender Mushrooms
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: two tall thin woodland mushrooms with long graceful stems and small pointed caps standing side by side, surrounded by short grass and a few low ferns on the forest floor

name: Mushroom Patch Scene
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a busy woodland patch packed with many mushrooms of all shapes and sizes, spotted caps, rounded caps and pointed caps mingled together, with grass, leaves, and a few small flowers filling the spaces between them

name: Mushroom with Ladybug
subject: nature/mushroom
prompt: a round spotted mushroom with a tiny smiling ladybug perched on the edge of its cap, a curl of grass at the base, a small leaf leaning against the stem, a cheerful gentle scene
